response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack and multi-language experience, but the role requires a Level II Engineering Manager with 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years in technical leadership focused on developer tools, build systems, and testing infrastructure. The resume shows no formal people-management experience (no direct reports, no performance reviews, no team leadership title), and while there is tangential dev-tooling work (CI/CD setup, test frameworks in D, MCP code generators), it is not the sustained 3-year developer-tools focus the role demands. Mobile platform ecosystem experience is also thin (some iOS/Apple TV work in 2015-2016).
strengths: 12+ years of software development across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Has built developer tooling: test runners (Trial), assertion libraries (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD pipelines, and MCP code generators
Strong teaching/mentoring track record via workshops, Code Katas, Refactoring Dojos, and Selenium courses
concerns: No evidence of formal people management — no direct reports, no manager title, no 1:1s or performance-review experience mentioned
Developer-tools/build-systems work is scattered side-projects rather than a sustained 3-year focus required by the role
Limited recent mobile-platform ecosystem experience; brief iOS/Apple TV stint was a decade ago

key_factors.factor: Broad senior IC technical depth and tooling side-projects
